extension.summary: Protector de pantalla Apple TV para Kodi
extension.description: This screensaver addon provides Apple TV aerial screensavers in Kodi
Este complemento habilita el protector de pantalla Aerial de Apple TV para Kodi
extension.news:
v11.3.0.3 (2026-06-17) - Added settings to change DV OSD luminance for CoreELEC while screensaver is running - Added fade out and fade in transitions when videos stop and start
v10.3.0.3 (2026-06-15) - Bumped major version to override upstream Kodi repository, keeping Kodi repo version as suffix - Transitioned to native Kodi C++ playlist engine - Added video title (sourced from Apple's JSON) and date/time overlay (with Arctic Fuse 3 font styling) - Added toggle in the add-on settings to enable/disable 'Show information' overlay (default: disabled) - Added explicit OS-level 'System Power Off' option to DPMS
